text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me you'd forgotten. I'll have you know
I've barely been able to contain my excitement
the whole month!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Why the hell would you be in a fuss about it?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
This is the one day of the year I can celebrate you
like this! And my super happy plan will make it
your happiest birthday yet!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
A "super happy plan"? Come on, I know it's just
getting ramen or going clover hunting or
whatever.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Of course it isn't. Here, take a look at what I'm
sending to your phone!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hmph... Yeah, I guess that's not so bad.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! Then first up is your favorite—a
hip-hop concert! Yo, yo, let's go, yo!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I'll go, okay? Just never do that again.
